scripts.dev: npm run sync-assets && npm run soundtrack && remotion studio src/index.ts
scripts.still: npm run sync-assets && npm run soundtrack && remotion still src/index.ts FamilyPlateAppPreview out/familyplate-preview-frame.png --frame=210
scripts.poster: npm run sync-assets && npm run soundtrack && remotion still src/index.ts FamilyPlateAppPreview ../mobile/store-assets/ios-69/familyplate-app-preview-poster.png --frame=210
scripts.render: npm run sync-assets && npm run soundtrack && remotion render src/index.ts FamilyPlateAppPreview ../mobile/store-assets/ios-69/familyplate-app-preview-886x1920.mp4 --codec=h264 --audio-codec=aac --overwrite
scripts.render:review: npm run sync-assets && npm run soundtrack && remotion render src/index.ts FamilyPlateAppPreview out/familyplate-app-preview-review.mp4 --codec=h264 --audio-codec=aac --overwrite
